prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 华中科技大学在青海省理科2021年最低位次约300名，2022年约399名（后移约99名），2023年回升至约243名（前移约156名），2024年进一步前移至约195名（前 移约48名）。近四年位次呈"后移-前移-再前移"的波动走势，整体竞争热度持续上升，2024年基准位次约195名。；该校在青 海省理科招生计划2021-2022年均为33人，2023年增至41人，2024年回落至33人；2026年物理类计划42人，较2024年33人扩招约27%，扩招幅度显著，理论上可缓解竞争 压力，推高位次数字。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021-2024年稳居第8名，2025-2026年位列第9名，稳居全国前十 ，属于顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"偏正面"，主要涉及学校管理回应与食堂宿舍正面评价（全国高校食堂排名第一 ），无负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第22位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，机械工程 、光学工程、电气工程获评A+，计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工程、动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、管理科学与工程获评A，物理学获评A，临床医学获评A-。A-及以 上学科达17个，学科实力雄厚，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；临床医学、 数学/统计等专业亦为推荐方向。青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人（数据标注不确定），较2025年物理类30457人增长约58%，考生规模大幅增加将加剧整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年基准位次约195名、2026年计划扩招27%（推高位次数字） 、青海省考生总数大幅增长约58%（推低位次数字）、学校声誉正面与专业热度高（推低位次数字）等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增长、热度上升大致对冲，但扩招幅度显著，位 次数字预计略有增大。预测2026年理科最低位次约242名，区间192-292名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约242名，区间192-292名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力（自动化类、电子信息类、临床医学、机械类），一档专业（计算机类、光电、电气）可作为冲刺目标 ，三档专业（材料类、土木类、环境类、生物科学类）作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（192名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Qinghai Province Science category: 2021 minimum ranking approximately 300, 2022 approximately 399 (shifted back by about 99), 2023 rebounded to approximately 243 (shifted forward by about 156), 2024 further shifted forward to approximately 195 (shifted forward by about 48). The rankings over the past four years show a fluctuating trend of "backward-forward-forward again", with overall competition heat continuously rising, and the 2024 baseline ranking approximately 195. The university's science enrollment plan in Qinghai Province was 33 in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 41 in 2023, and fell back to 33 in 2024; the 2026 Physics Category plan is 42, an expansion of about 27% compared to 33 in 2024, a significant expansion rate, theoretically easing competition pressure and pushing the ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranked 8th in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2024, and 9th in 2025-2026, consistently among the top ten nationally, belonging to the top-tier university level, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is "slightly positive", mainly involving positive evaluations of school management responses and dormitory cafeterias (ranked first in national university cafeteria rankings), with no negative public opinion; Douyin heat total ranking 22nd (relatively hot), short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering were rated A+, Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering were rated A, Physics was rated A, and Clinical Medicine was rated A-. There are 17 disciplines rated A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be hot/highly recommended; Clinical Medicine, Mathematics/Statistics, and other majors are also recommended directions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is approximately 48,000 (data marked as uncertain), an increase of about 58% compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 30,457, and the significant increase in candidate scale will intensify overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2024 baseline ranking of approximately 195, the 2026 plan expansion of 27% (pushing the ranking number higher), the significant increase of about 58% in the total number of Qinghai Province candidates (pushing the ranking number lower), positive school reputation and high major popularity (pushing the ranking number lower), the expansion effect and candidate growth and heat increase roughly offset each other, but the expansion rate is significant, and the ranking number is expected to increase slightly. The predicted 2026 Science minimum ranking is approximately 242, with a range of 192-292.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 242, range 192-292. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Electronic Information, Clinical Medicine, Mechanical Engineering) as the main force, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Optoelectronics, Electrical Engineering) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Materials Science, Civil Engineering, Environmental Science, Biological Sciences) as safety choices. Candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (within 192) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
